completions.label: matches!
completions.detail: Check if expression matches a pattern

documentation.value:
Causes compilation to fail with the given error message.

```rust
#[cfg(not(any(feature = "a", feature = "b")))]
compile_error!("Either feature 'a' or 'b' must be enabled");
```

Defines a struct type.

```rust
struct Point {
    x: f64,
    y: f64,
}
struct Color(u8, u8, u8); // tuple struct
struct Unit; // unit struct
```

Defines an enum type.

```rust
enum Direction {
    Up,
    Down,
    Left,
    Right,
}
enum Message {
    Quit,
    Text(String),
    Move { x: i32, y: i32 },
}
```

Specifies trait bounds in a where clause.

```rust
fn process<T>(item: T) -> String
where
    T: Display + Clone,
{
    format!("{}", item)
}
```

Binds by reference during pattern matching.

```rust
let ref x = 5; // x: &i32
match value {
    ref v => println!("{}", v),
}
```

completions.label: impl Trait for Type
completions.detail: Implement a trait for a type

documentation.value:
Pattern matching with multiple arms.

```rust
match command {
    Command::Quit => break,
    Command::Echo(msg) => println!("{}", msg),
    Command::Move { x, y } => move_to(x, y),
    _ => eprintln!("Unknown command"),
}
```

completions.label: Display trait

documentation.value:
Format trait for the `{:?}` marker. Usually derived.

```rust
#[derive(Debug)]
struct Point { x: f64, y: f64 }
println!("{:?}", point);
println!("{:#?}", point); // pretty-print
```
